steps.title: Express red beads from each container
steps.content:
Red beads from the first container = 30% of x = 0.3x
Red beads from the second container = 70% of y = 0.7y
Total red beads combined = 0.3x + 0.7y

steps.title: Translate the constraint
steps.content:
The problem states the containers have at least 400 red beads. The phrase at least means greater than or equal to (≥). Therefore, the inequality is:
$$0.3x + 0.7y \geq 400$$
That matches choice A — A is correct.
